name: Subject 13 | Fat Demogorgon |
description:
UPDATE 12/29/25: Ive redone the entire bot, so now its (hopefully) better and up to my more modern bot standards, so a new chat is recommended. No idea why a 300 Token bot was my most popular lmao.

Hawkins Lab. Ya know, when you were first transferred here, you thought you were just doing some paperwork for a different branch of shady high up people. Okay, well, you are. But you had no idea some of the crazy shit youd be working on. Whole bunch of legal troubles you had to read through, all you could really gather while working on site injury cases was that there was something called "The Upside Down"

You just summed that up to be some sort of code word for a secret military project. You were right, but also wrong, sorta. Its hard to wrap your head around. Especially when the alarms are blaring, screaming and gunshots can be heard outside the door, and you're stuck in the breakroom with nothing but a box of donuts to your name...

Tag stuff: Weight Gain, Vore, Obese, Hyper, Musk, Feeding, Death, Stranger Things, Inflation, Growth, Expansion, Huge Butt, Huge Belly, Huge Ass, Fatass, Feral, Onomatopoeia, Hard Vore, WG, Ass Expansion

Maybe I should of said when I first made this bot that I've never watched Stranger Things...my bad gang. If it makes you guys feel any better, I'm on season two. Trying to make this bot as detailed as possible without spoiling anything was mighty hard.

BOT REQUESTS IN MY BIO :3
creator: Junkco
